texto: What we want to do in this moment is rarely what's best for us. We need to take a longer view of life and to realize that to become someone worth becoming, I probably need to be doing things I don't want to be doing.
explicacao: Citação de Vince Antonucci sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “What we want to do in this moment is rarely what's best for us. We need to take a longer view of …” articula reflexao, big-picture-thinking, maturity em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como maturity.

frase_original: What we want to do in this moment is rarely what's best for us. We need to take a longer view of life and to realize that to become someone worth becoming, I probably need to be doing things I don't want to be doing.

texto: Maybe you've gotten through something and when you did you thought, I am leaving that behind and will never return. And that's a great way of thinking...for selfish jerks.If we actually care about people other than ourselves, we can't leave our problems behind and never return. If we don't take the freedom we've experienced and try to bring it to others, we are not becoming people worth becoming.
explicacao: Citação de Vince Antonucci sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Maybe you've gotten through something and when you did you thought, I am leaving that behind and …” articula autoestima, compassion, concern-for-others em registro de autoestima, com relevância para contextos como concern-for-others e freedom.

And that's a great way of thinking...for selfish jerks.If we actually care about people other than ourselves, we can't leave our problems behind and never return.
